notes: Landing retired — power-topology folded into the app boot screen. dct-ios.html: front-door guard removed; power-topology box transplanted into #boot (scoped .pwr-topo, hardcoded colors, namespaced SVG ids pt-*, renamed keyframes pwrflow/pwrnodepulse/pwrsrcpulse — collision-proof); status rows trimmed to 4 (EDP, Fiber+optics, Triage, Ghost Echo; cut Offline cache, Power topology, Hardware faults). index.html is now a redirect to dct-ios.html; landing.html deleted. manifest start_url back to ./dct-ios.html; sw.js drops index.html from precache and navigation offline-fallback maps to dct-ios.html. C1-C6 intact. Three stamps at v1.6.69.
